eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Clark, KS; at 06:39 PM ON MAY 18, 2026 Effective until 07:09 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Evacuation for fire threat Residents evacuate now due to fire threat.Evacuation area:  cr 19 to cr 25 and cr z north to highway 160go east to Coldwater High School
